name: FIRST_ASSIGNEE_BY_PATHWAY
description: First assignee by pathway. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count
ORDER BY first_year ASC, patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 1

examples: Within target-pair combinations related to the SHC1 events in EGFR signaling pathway, which company disclosed them first?
Within target-pair combinations related to the Signaling by Activin pathway, which company disclosed them first?
Within target-pair combinations related to the Dissolution of Fibrin Clot pathway, which company disclosed them first?
